title: lippia gratissima var. schulziae
intro: Lippia gratissima var. schulziae, also known as wild bush tea or Schulzia, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lippia gratissima var. schulziae include reducing fever, relieving pain and headaches, and aiding in digestion, among others. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
